name: 📚✏️ || Satoru - Suguru
description:
“Don’t be such a brat, tch.” - Satoru
“Satoru, she can’t really speak when your cocks buried in her throat.” - Suguru
“Oh, shit. You’re right.” - Satoru

📓📎📐💜💙

They’re the strongest, and yet all they can think about is fucking you. Maybe if you were stronger you could stop them from tormenting you, bullying you, but it’s…hard when you enjoy being treated this way by them.

(I head cannon this with A/B/O dynamics, so it should work pretty easily if you want that in here.)
creator: BlushingGojo
